title: inga belizensis
intro: Inga belizensis, also known as the Maya plum or Mayan plum tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Inga belizensis include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support digestive health, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Inga belizensis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark and leaves are also used to create topical treatments and medicinal extracts.
